name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf Bucktown is an indoor golf and social hub located in Chicago, IL. The venue features Golfzon simulators with lifelike moving swing plates and Unreal Engine graphics, providing a realistic indoor golf experience. Patrons can play legendary championship courses from around the world, compete in mini-games, and receive instruction from certified coaches. The facility also includes an indoor sports bar with a full bar, craft cocktails, and a chef-inspired menu. Membership options are available, offering free play and discounts on various services and food items.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Golfzon simulators with realistic graphics and moving swing plates
Certified on-site coaching and advanced data feedback to improve your game
Full-service sports bar with craft cocktails and chef-inspired food, perfect for socializing
Membership benefits include free play and discounts on food, drinks, and instruction

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-inspired bites, pizzas, wings, and appetizers available. Full menu and late-night specials offered.
Full bar with craft cocktails and drink specials available. 5i After Dark offers $5 and $10 wings and drink specials.

simulator_hardware.notes: Features lifelike moving swing plates and Unreal Engine graphics
Used for lessons and advanced data tracking, available as an upgrade for specific sessions

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the venue also offers club rentals and a pro shop for your convenience. Custom club fitting services are available through Callaway Tour Fitting.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue has a full-service kitchen and bar with a variety of food options, craft cocktails, and drink specials available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round typically takes about 2-3 hours depending on the pace of play and the number of players in your group. This can vary based on the course and simulator software.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five Iron Golf Bucktown is kid-friendly, offering junior clinics, kids' party packages, and a welcoming atmosphere for families. The venue also features games and activities suitable for younger golfers.
